articles.title: Wembanyama leads Spurs by Suns to end 6-season playoff drought, stirring memories of historic run
articles.original_title: Wembanyama leads Spurs by Suns to end 6-season playoff drought, stirring memories of historic run
articles.summary: San Antonio Spurs forward Keldon Johnson held his head high through several dismal seasons, promising fans it would not always be so bleak.  Victor Wembanyama’s 17-foot, pullup jumper with a second left ended a six-season postseason drought as the Spurs secured a top-six finish in the Western Conference.  “When you're building something, it doesn’t happen overnight,” Johnson said.

articles.title: Latham shines as New Zealand beats South Africa in 3rd T20 to lead series 2-1
articles.original_title: Latham shines as New Zealand beats South Africa in 3rd T20 to lead series 2-1
articles.summary: Tom Latham carried his bat for 63 and put on 96 for the first wicket with Devon Conway to set up New Zealand's eight-wicket win over South Africa in their third Twenty20 on Friday.  Conway made 39 and Latham reached his fourth T20 half-century, helping New Zealand's cricketers pass South Africa's 136-9 with 22 balls remaining to take a 2-1 lead in the five-match series.
